# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    W, B = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
    pattern = "wbwbwwbwbwbw"
    length = len(pattern)
    target_length = W + B

    # Check all possible substrings of S with length target_length
    # Since S is infinitely repeated, we only need to check substrings in one full cycle of the pattern
    for i in range(length):
        # Create a window of size target_length starting at i
        window = ""
        for j in range(target_length):
            window += pattern[(i + j) % length]
        w_count = window.count('w')
        b_count = window.count('b')
        if w_count == W and b_count == B:
            print("Yes")
            return
    print("No")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
